top_signals.title: Canada wants Saab early-warning aircraft under push to retool defense suppliers
top_signals.summary: Prime Minister Mark Carney has pledged to diversify and localize defense production following continued threats by U.S. President Trump.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: TikTok Is Driving A Men’s Fragrance Boom
top_signals.summary: What's that smell? It could be a TikTok influencer who’s doused himself in the scent he’s pitching. Corporations and influencers alike are capitalizing on a post-pandemic boom in fragrances in the US, particularly among men. Rainier Harris reports. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
